title: Editor Copilot Action Log
description: Logs every action taken by the Editor Copilot during content authoring.

logId.description: Unique identifier for this log entry.

authoringSessionId.description: Join key that groups actions within a single authoring workflow, branch, or pull request.

actorId.description: Identifier for the human editor who invoked the Copilot action.

targetObjectType.description: Type of object being edited, such as Template, Pattern, or PolicyRule.

targetObjectId.description: Identifier of the object being acted on, such as a templateId or selectorPatternId.

sessionId.description: Runtime session identifier for the user or play session that this action ultimately affects.

regionId.description: Region identifier associated with the content being edited, if applicable.

seedId.description: Seed identifier associated with the content being edited, if applicable.

descriptorId.description: Generic descriptor join key linking to the governed object or descriptor this action concerns.

sessionMetricsEnvelopeId.description: Optional join key linking to the session metrics envelope active when this action occurred.

details.description: Details specific to this Copilot action.

suggestionText.description: Text of a suggestion provided by the Copilot.

checkResults.description: Results of automated checks or validations performed by the Copilot.

generatedCode.description: Code or content generated by the Copilot.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when this action was logged.
